data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement regarding 'Power/catering/water access notes', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for these notes, yet the evidence does not include any checks or confirmations related to power, catering, or water access. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary validation was not performed.
gaps: Power/catering/water access notes validation not performed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
